body.title: CLOSED: Fix ENGRAM_CODE_* triggers to match payload key
body.result: Already done: seed script writes triggers={'__entry__':'cells'}, DB rows have correct key, test_node_executor.py:1118 covers the regression. No code change needed.
body.description:
Pass-2 area_2 finding: ENGRAM_CODE_* seed writes triggers that don't match the payload key the node_executor reads. Fix the seed script to write triggers={"__entry__": "cells"} and re-seed the ENGRAM_CODE_* rows.

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/seed_coding_engrams.py, wild_igor/igor/cognition/node_executor.py, DB rows (ENGRAM_CODE_*)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite
**Scope boundary:** IN — fix trigger key mismatch in seed + re-seed rows. OUT — redesigning the engram execution model.
**Test plan:** After re-seed, verify ENGRAM_CODE_* rows have correct trigger key via psql; unit test in test_node_executor.py asserts payload["__entry__"] == "cells" fires the engram.
**Pass condition:** `psql -c "SELECT metadata->>'triggers' FROM clan.memories WHERE id LIKE 'ENGRAM_CODE_%' LIMIT 1"` returns a JSON object with key `__entry__`.
